overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt trail through sunlit grasslands. The character progresses from an open meadow area into a section with a prominent rocky outcrop on the left, maintaining a steady walking pace throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the dirt path through open sunlit grassland, heading toward distant trees

entered.detail: winding dirt path with visible tire tracks and patches of grass
tall green grass surrounding both sides of the trail
mature deciduous trees with full green canopies scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through open grasslands. The environment is bright and sunny with clear blue skies visible above. Tall green grass flanks both sides of the path while scattered trees dot the landscape ahead. The character maintains a steady walking pace through this serene natural setting with no other agents or structures visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail alongside rocky hillside with dense tree cover

events.description: large rocky outcrop emerges into view on the left side of the trail, changing the landscape from open grassland to rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path as the terrain transitions to feature a prominent rocky cliff face on the left

entered.detail: large tan-colored rocky cliff face with visible stratification rising beside the trail
dense cluster of trees growing on the rocky hillside creating partial canopy cover
gnarled dead tree with bare branches standing prominently in the grass field

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the open grassland gives way to a more enclosed trail section with a prominent rocky outcrop on the left. The terrain becomes more rugged with trees growing directly from the rocky slope, partially obscuring the sky. A distinctive dead tree becomes visible on the right side of the path. The dirt trail continues winding forward through this rockier landscape, with the character maintaining the same steady walking pace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright, open meadow that gradually transitions into a more rugged, enclosed trail. It begins with a third-person view of a cowboy walking along a dirt path flanked by tall green grass under a clear blue sky. As the character progresses, the wide-open landscape shifts toward a more confined environment where a prominent rocky outcrop rises on the left. The scene then becomes more rugged as trees grow directly from the rocky slope and a distinctive dead tree appears on the right, partially obscuring the sky. The camera continues to follow the character at a steady pace as the trail winds forward through this increasingly stony terrain.
